item.title: DevicesWorld：异构环境中跨设备代理的基准测试
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13465v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM-based agents have rapidly improved at operating individual digital environments such as mobile applications, desktop systems, and smart homes. However, real-world user goals often span multiple devices: information may come from a phone, be processed on a desktop, and
